root.hardware-state:
<#if eth\-port\-hw\-option== "veip" > VEIPPORT${eth\-port\-hw\-number} nokia-hwi:virtual-port <#else> <#if special\-integrated\-ONUs?has_content && special\-integrated\-ONUs== true > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} bbf-hwt:rj45 <#else> <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option== "rj45" > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} bbf-hwt:rj45 <#else> <#if pluggable\-optical\-electrical\-SFP?has_content && pluggable\-optical\-electrical\-SFP== true > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} bbf-hwt:transceiver-link <#else> PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} nokia-hwi:${eth\-port\-hw\-option} </#if> </#if> </#if> </#if>
<#if pluggable\-optical\-electrical\-SFP?has_content && pluggable\-optical\-electrical\-SFP== true >
25G_cage nokia-hwi:cage-uni
25G_transceiver bbf-hwt:transceiver
</#if>
